dtsPropsFor.Prio:
/** Numeric priority 0.0–1.0 → coarse A/B/C/D band (A ≥ 0.75, B ≥ 0.5, C ≥ 0.25, else D). */
  priority: number;
dtsPropsFor.Status:
/** Lifecycle status: inbox | pending | active | scheduled | done | parked | dismissed | suspended | deleted. */
  status: string;
dtsPropsFor.Stage:
/** Distillation stage: raw_source | rough_topic | raw_extract | clean_extract | atomic_statement | card_draft | active_card | mature_card | synthesis. */
  stage: string;
dtsPropsFor.Tag:
/** Tag label, rendered as a flat pill. */
  name: string;
dtsPropsFor.Pipeline:
/** Current stage key (source | extract | clean | atomic | card | mature); null = neutral diagram, every stage uniform. */
  active?: string | null;
dtsPropsFor.Kbd:
/** A single key, or a sequence rendered as adjacent caps (e.g. ["⌘", "K"]). */
  keys: string | readonly string[];
